name: Kotopoulo Giouvetsi
recipeIngredient: 2 large Bell peppers, cored, seeded, and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Wash the chicken and rub it with one tablespoon of olive oil on both the outside and inside. Season the skin with salt and pepper.
3. Place the chicken in a medium-to-large baking pan, preferably made of glass or clay. Spread the orzo evenly around the chicken. Add the remaining ingredients except for the cheese and toss everything together in the pan.
4. Put the pan into the oven and reduce the temperature to 350°F. Bake for 1 to 1-1/2 hours, basting the chicken every 10 to 15 minutes with pan juices. If the orzo seems too dry during baking, add more water as needed.
5. Before serving, sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese on top.
